notes: research disabled by default — we have a mapped codebase (.planning/codebase/) and a customer-validated direction (.planning/feedback/2026-05-01-ben-bertsche-review.md). Flip per-phase via /gsd-plan-phase --research when a phase warrants it.
coarse granularity — milestone-sized phases are appropriate for a demo where a single dev iterates fast.

specialist agents that target a backend (auth-admin-specialist, backend-specialist, storage-specialist) DO NOT apply to this static-SPA repo. See .planning/codebase/ARCHITECTURE.md and project memory project_static_demo_no_backend.md.
